levels.title: Foundation
levels.subtitle: Start from zero
levels.description: Small French blocks for pronunciation, recognition, and imitation.

levels.title: Intensive
levels.subtitle: Make it automatic
levels.description: More drills, substitutions, tense work, and short answers.

levels.title: Growth
levels.subtitle: Speak with more range
levels.description: Longer conversations, stories, opinions, and natural rhythm.

lessons.title: Pronouns: subject, object, possessive
lessons.subtitle: Je, me, mon: the small words that hold sentences together.

lessons.title: 20 common verbs: present tense
lessons.subtitle: High-frequency verbs for almost every beginner sentence.

lessons.title: 50 daily-life nouns
lessons.subtitle: Objects, people, places, and time words you can use today.

lessons.title: There is / there are: il y a
lessons.subtitle: The beginner structure that unlocks places, objects, and descriptions.

lessons.title: Daily dialogues: greetings and simple talk
lessons.subtitle: Tiny conversations you can repeat until they feel automatic.

lessons.title: Articles and gender: un, une, le, la, les
lessons.subtitle: Learn nouns with their small companion words.

lessons.title: Negation: ne ... pas
lessons.subtitle: Say what is not true with one simple frame.

lessons.title: Basic questions: est-ce que and question words
lessons.subtitle: Ask simple things without changing the whole sentence.

lessons.title: Simple adjectives: agreement and position
lessons.subtitle: Make tiny descriptions with gender and number.

lessons.title: Numbers and time: 0-20, today, tomorrow
lessons.subtitle: Say small quantities and simple time phrases.

lessons.title: Places: à, dans, sur, sous
lessons.subtitle: Put people and things in simple places.

lessons.title: De: possession, origin, and content
lessons.subtitle: One small word with several beginner uses.

lessons.title: Avoir expressions: age, hunger, thirst
lessons.subtitle: French says I have hunger, thirst, and years.

lessons.title: Faire: weather and activities
lessons.subtitle: Use faire for weather and simple activities.

lessons.title: Aller: places and near future
lessons.subtitle: Go somewhere, then say what you are going to do.

lessons.title: Vouloir and pouvoir + infinitive
lessons.subtitle: Say what you want and what you can do.

lessons.title: Likes and preferences: aimer, adorer, préférer
lessons.subtitle: Say what you like, love, and prefer.

lessons.title: This and these: ce, cet, cette, ces
lessons.subtitle: Point to things clearly in French.

lessons.title: Directions: left, right, near, far
lessons.subtitle: Understand and give small directions.

lessons.title: Connectors: et, mais, parce que
lessons.subtitle: Join tiny sentences into useful thoughts.
